programs.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programs.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that is home to dishes like tafelspitz and goulash.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programs.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city famous for its food; he learns how to make egg pasta.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programs.desc: Rick visits Lisbon, a city in love with its seafood and perhaps the best custard tarts in the world.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programs.desc: In Sardinia Rick watches the fishermen catch mullet; Sicily to find one of the best pasta dishes.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programs.desc: Rick travels from Sicily to Puglia.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programs.desc: Rick departs Italy and makes his way to the Greek island of Corfu.
